title: Assist with surface irrigation operations
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assist with surface irrigation operations demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan and prepare for work

pcs.text: Read work instructions and confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to minimise risks to self and others
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Read work instructions and confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to minimise risks to self and others?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Read work instructions and confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to minimise risks to self and others.

pcs.text: Select appropriate tools and equipment for the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select appropriate tools and equipment for the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select appropriate tools and equipment for the task.

pcs.text: Select, fit and use personal protective equipment and clothing applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment and clothing applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment and clothing applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Identify site for installation of the irrigation system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify site for installation of the irrigation system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify site for installation of the irrigation system.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan and prepare for work

elements.title: Set up field for surface irrigation systems as directed

pcs.text: Check irrigation gates, channels and ditch-ends
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check irrigation gates, channels and ditch-ends?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check irrigation gates, channels and ditch-ends.

pcs.text: Check pumps, bores and other water delivery mechanisms for correct irrigation set up
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check pumps, bores and other water delivery mechanisms for correct irrigation set up?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check pumps, bores and other water delivery mechanisms for correct irrigation set up.

pcs.text: Position and secure tarpaulins or other water control devices as directed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Position and secure tarpaulins or other water control devices as directed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Position and secure tarpaulins or other water control devices as directed.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Set up field for surface irrigation systems as directed

elements.title: Carry out routine maintenance activities on irrigation delivery systems as directed

pcs.text: Assist with mechanical equipment servicing according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist with mechanical equipment servicing according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist with mechanical equipment servicing according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Flush and clean supply and distribution system as directed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Flush and clean supply and distribution system as directed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Flush and clean supply and distribution system as directed.

pcs.text: Maintain system inlets, outlets, structures and fittings
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain system inlets, outlets, structures and fittings?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain system inlets, outlets, structures and fittings.

pcs.text: Check system is running smoothly and is free of damage, leaks and blockages in channels, drains and outlets
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check system is running smoothly and is free of damage, leaks and blockages in channels, drains and outlets?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check system is running smoothly and is free of damage, leaks and blockages in channels, drains and outlets.

pcs.text: Clean irrigation system and ensure there is no disruption to the system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean irrigation system and ensure there is no disruption to the system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean irrigation system and ensure there is no disruption to the system.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Carry out routine maintenance activities on irrigation delivery systems as directed

elements.title: Undertake surface irrigation work as directed

pcs.text: Open and shut gates and valves
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Open and shut gates and valves?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Open and shut gates and valves.

pcs.text: Ensure required head and water levels in head ditch are achieved and maintained to ensure sufficient water flow and availability to crops
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure required head and water levels in head ditch are achieved and maintained to ensure sufficient water flow and availability to crops?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure required head and water levels in head ditch are achieved and maintained to ensure sufficient water flow and availability to crops.

pcs.text: Start or open the required number of siphons
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Start or open the required number of siphons?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Start or open the required number of siphons.

pcs.text: Monitor progress of water flow in furrows
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor progress of water flow in furrows?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor progress of water flow in furrows.

pcs.text: Lift siphons where irrigation is complete
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Lift siphons where irrigation is complete?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Lift siphons where irrigation is complete.

pcs.text: Carry out irrigation change and mark
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out irrigation change and mark?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out irrigation change and mark.

pcs.text: Use mechanical equipment to build and repair banks and for weed removal
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use mechanical equipment to build and repair banks and for weed removal?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use mechanical equipment to build and repair banks and for weed removal.

pcs.text: Move irrigation equipment according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Move irrigation equipment according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Move irrigation equipment according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Record damage and blockage caused by weeds by damage type, location and the section of the system affected

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record damage and blockage caused by weeds by damage type, location and the section of the system affected.
